heading: Transfers and assignments
label: 4133 Transfers and assignments
text: The transfer or assignment for value of any property forming the subject matter of a claim under subsection (a) or (b) of subsequent to its damage, loss, or destruction shall not operate to extinguish any claim of the transferor otherwise compensable under either of such subsections. If a claim which could otherwise be allowed under subsection (a) or (b) of has been assigned for value prior to , the assignee shall be the party entitled to claim thereunder.section 4132 of this titlesection 4132 of this titleOctober 22, 1962
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 2017b of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
